mapper.sql: select id, order_sn, shop_id, shop_erp_id,shop_erp_name, shop_type, cat_id_1, cat_id_2, cat_id_3, cat_id_4, item_list, order_total, goods_amount, order_change_amount, pay_amount,created_by, created_at, confirm_status, confirm_at, pay_no, pay_at, pay_type, platform_discount, buyer_memo, order_status, shipping_id, shipping_at, city, city_id, province, province_id, country, country_id, town, town_id, tracking_number, remark, remark_tag, remark_tag_name, receive_at, after_sales_status, updated_at, is_show, shop_md5_prefix,is_issue,erp_after_sales_status, erp_ass_create_at,erp_ass_reason,erp_ass_remark,erp_ass_address,receiver_name,mobile from erp_goods_order

where.if: and created_at >= CASE WHEN LENGTH(created_at) = 10 THEN #{order.startTime} / 1000 ELSE #{order.startTime} END
and created_at <= CASE WHEN LENGTH(created_at) = 10 THEN #{order.endTime} / 1000 ELSE #{order.endTime} END

mapper.select: where id = #{id}
where order_sn = #{orderSn}
where order_sn = #{orderSn}
where order_sn = #{orderSn} and item_list like concat('%', #{goodsId}, '%')
order by created_at desc limit #{order.pageNum}, #{order.pageSize}
select count(*) from erp_goods_order
mapper.insert: insert into erp_goods_order ( order_sn, shop_id, shop_erp_id, shop_erp_name, shop_type, cat_id_1, cat_id_2, cat_id_3, cat_id_4, item_list, order_total, goods_amount, order_change_amount, pay_amount, created_by, created_at, confirm_status, confirm_at, pay_no, pay_at, pay_type, platform_discount, buyer_memo, order_status, shipping_id, shipping_at, city, city_id, province, province_id, country, country_id, town, town_id, tracking_number, remark, remark_tag, remark_tag_name, receive_at, after_sales_status, updated_at, is_show, is_issue, receiver_name, mobile ) values ( #{orderSn}, #{shopId}, #{shopErpId}, #{shopErpName}, #{shopType}, #{catId1}, #{catId2}, #{catId3}, #{catId4}, #{itemList}, #{orderTotal}, #{goodsAmount}, #{orderChangeAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{confirmStatus}, #{confirmAt}, #{payNo}, #{payAt}, #{payType}, #{platformDiscount}, #{buyerMemo}, #{orderStatus}, #{shippingId}, #{shippingAt}, #{city}, #{cityId}, #{province}, #{provinceId}, #{country}, #{countryId}, #{town}, #{townId}, #{trackingNumber}, #{remark}, #{remarkTag}, #{remarkTagName}, #{receiveAt}, #{afterSalesStatus}, #{updatedAt}, #{isShow}, #{isIssue}, #{receiverName}, #{mobile} )
mapper.update: update erp_goods_order set is_show = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount < 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '0-10元', SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 AND pay_amount < 3000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '10-30元', SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount >= 3000 AND pay_amount < 5000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '30-50元', SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 AND pay_amount < 10000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '50-100元', SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount >= 10000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '100元以上' FROM erp_goods_order WHERE created_at >= #{creatStart} AND created_at < #{creatEnd} AND created_by = #{id} AND order_status NOT IN (5, 6) AND pay_amount > 0

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount < 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '0-10元', SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 AND pay_amount < 3000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '10-30元', SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount >= 3000 AND pay_amount < 5000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '30-50元', SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 AND pay_amount < 10000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '50-100元', SUM(CASE WHEN pay_amount >= 10000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as '100元以上' FROM erp_goods_order WHERE created_at >= #{creatStart} AND created_at < #{creatEnd} AND order_status NOT IN (5, 6) AND pay_amount > 0
